### Post by wlraider70 on 2012-12-14
I'm trying to a get a SIP connection.

When I disable iptables it works, when they are up it fails.
I want to open port 5060-5080 and 10,000-20,000


Here are my tables
```


cat /etc/sysconfig/iptables
```

I entered these commands

iptables -A INPUT -p udp -m udp --dport 5060 -j ACCEPT
iptables -A INPUT -p udp -m udp --dport 10000:20000 -j ACCEPT

Did I do it right?
The connection still fails if I bring the service up.
